heading: Commission report to Congress; periodic reports; expenditure of appropriations
label: 3006 Commission report to Congress; periodic reports; expenditure of appropriations
text: The Commission is authorized and directed to report to the House of Representatives and the Senate with respect to the matters covered by this chapter on a periodic basis and to provide information to Members of the House and Senate as requested. For each fiscal year for which an appropriation is made the Commission shall submit to Congress a report on its expenditures under such appropriation.
notes: Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of provisions of law requiring submittal to Congress of any annual, semiannual, or other regular periodic report listed in House Document No. 103–7 (in which a report required under this section is listed on page 157), see , as amended, set out as a note under , Money and Finance.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31
